name: Divinity Fudge (Ohio)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put sugar, hot water, and corn syrup into a saucepan.
2. Heat slowly to boiling, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Wipe down any sugar crystals from the side of the pan before the syrup starts to boil.
4. When the syrup begins to boil, beat egg whites with salt until foamy.
5. Pour 2 tablespoons of syrup onto the egg whites and continue beating.
6. Cook the syrup to a soft ball stage (234°F).
7. Pour half of the syrup over the beaten egg whites very slowly and continue beating.
Note: The recipe does not specify what to do with the remaining half of the syrup.
